bids.reasoning: At t=0.0 there is no time pressure to concede, so I am targeting my maximum-utility bid. The opponent opened with all valueF, which is very poor for my preferences and gives no reliable sign of concession yet, so I will counter with my strongest valid values on every issue.

At t=0.02 it is very early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making only a small concession to avoid simply repeating my previous all-best offer. The opponent has held firm on all valueF, which is very low utility for me, and there is no message or valid evidence yet that I should make a large concession. I am conceding slightly on issueC to valueB while holding my highest-weight issueA and other important issues at valueA.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.84 because it is still very early in the negotiation, so there is no need for major concessions yet. The opponent moved away from all valueF toward issueA=valueB and issueC=valueC, so I am making a small concession on issueC while holding firm on my most important and high-value issues.

At t=0.06 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making only limited concessions. The opponent has improved from all valueF to offers that include issueA:valueB and issueC:valueC, suggesting some concession, but they are still holding issueB and issueD at low-utility values for me, so I will hold firm on those important issues and concede modestly on issueC.

At t=0.08 it is still very early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid for myself around 0.84 rather than making major concessions. The opponent briefly improved from all valueF to some better values for me, but their latest offer dropped back in utility, so I do not read a reliable concession trend yet; I will vary my last bid slightly while holding firm on my most important issues.

I am targeting a high early-stage utility around 0.84, since time is only at 0.10 and there is no need for large concessions yet. The opponent’s latest offer improved substantially for me by moving issueA to valueA, but they are still holding unfavorable positions on issueB and issueD, while repeatedly signaling interest in issueC: valueC; I can concede there while holding firm on my most important issueA and strong values on issueB/issueD.

At t=0.12 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making a modest concession to avoid simply repeating my last offer. The opponent has repeatedly signaled interest in issueC: valueC and has recently offered issueB: valueB, so I concede on those lower-weight tradeoff areas while holding issueA and issueD at my best values.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.84 because it is still early at t=0.14, so there is no need for major concessions yet. The opponent has been inconsistent but repeatedly offers issueC=valueC and once conceded issueA=valueA, so I will keep my most important issueA and issueD at valueA while making the moderate concession on issueC=valueC.

At t=0.16 it is still early, so I am targeting a strong utility bid around 0.76 while making a modest concession from my last offer. The opponent repeatedly offers issueC:valueC and often issueB:valueB/valueD, so I concede on issueB and issueC while holding firm on my highest-weight issueA and valuable issueD.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.76 because it is still early at t=0.18, so there is no need to make large concessions yet. I am targeting a still-high utility bid around 0.76 because the negotiation is early at t=0.20, so there is no need to concede heavily yet. The opponent consistently pushes issueC=valueC and often offers issueB=valueB, while issueD remains costly for me to concede, so I keep issueA and issueD at my best values and make moderate concessions on issueB/issueC.

At t=0.22 it is still early enough to target a high-utility bid, but I can make a modest concession to avoid stalling. At t=0.24, I am still in the early phase, so I targeted a strong utility bid while continuing to concede on lower-cost dimensions. The opponent repeatedly offers issueC:valueC and often issueB:valueB, while occasionally granting issueA:valueA, so I keep my high-weight issueA and issueD at valueA and concede issueB/issueC toward their apparent preferences.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.77 because the negotiation is only at t=0.26, so I should concede selectively but not drop near the opponent’s low offers yet. I am targeting a still-high utility around 0.758, conceding mainly on issueC and moderately on issueB while holding issueD at my best value because dropping issueD is costly. I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.676, since we are only at t=0.30 but should begin making visible concessions.
